response.step_by_step_log:
Identified two karaoke songs based on on-screen text in the karaoke overlay. 
Song 1: 'テレパシーザッピング' (Telepathy Zapping), artist DECO*27.
Song 2: '月に向かって撃て' (Tsuki ni Mukatte Ute), artist Nanahoshi Kangakudan.
Performed Google searches for both titles with 'Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve full text and translations.
The performers are the four VTubers: Natsuiro Matsuri, Amane Kanata, Shishiro Botan, and La+ Darknesss.
response.global_summary: A karaoke video featuring four VTubers (Natsuiro Matsuri, Amane Kanata, Shishiro Botan, and La+ Darknesss) performing a 2-song medley, separated by a brief dialogue interval.

Come on, gimme gimme more
:-b ;-b boy, :-b ;-b boy, duh
Bleh!
Check me out, study and don me, don don

scenes.performer_in_video: Natsuiro Matsuri, Amane Kanata, Shishiro Botan, La+ Darknesss,original_language:
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
眺めているばかり
手を伸ばして思い出す
聞かれたくない弱音
聴かせたい声
不可能も可能性だ
君が誰なんだか知ってんだ
証明しよう 僕ら
本当はどうしたい？
逃げたいと耳塞いだ
しゃがむ心臓を叩いてった
Swing by
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just watching from afar
Reaching out to make memories
Soundless whimpers I don't want you to hear
Voice I want you to listen to
Even the impossible is a possibility
I know who you are
Let's prove it, us
What do you really want to do?
I covered my ears, wanting to run away
And kept hitting my crouching heart
Swing by
